query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.claim_id,
  LEFT(p.input_summary, 300) AS input_summary,
  LEFT(p.prediction_result, 300) AS prediction_result,
  p.created_at
FROM ai_prediction_logs p
WHERE 
  LOWER(p.input_summary) LIKE '%cow%'
  OR LOWER(p.input_summary) LIKE '%animal%'
  OR LOWER(p.input_summary) LIKE '%zig%'
  OR LOWER(p.prediction_result) LIKE '%cow%'
  OR LOWER(p.prediction_result) LIKE '%animal%'
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
